Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.terminal
     
    com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.type
     
  • Class
    Description
    Configuration
    Determines the behavior of a validator.
    ConfigurationUpdater
    Updates the configuration used by new validators.
    DefaultJavaValidators
    Creates validators for the Java API, using the default configuration.
    EqualityMethod
    The method used to check whether two values are equal.
    GlobalConfiguration
    The configuration shared by all validators.
    JavaAssumeThat
    Creates validators for class invariants and method postconditions of the Java API, throwing AssertionError if a failure occurs.
    JavaCheckIf
    Creates validators for the Java API, recording any failures that occur.
    JavaRequireThat
    Creates validators for method preconditions of the Java API, throwing an exception if a failure occurs.
    JavaValidators
    Creates validators for the Java API with an independent configuration.
    MultipleFailuresException
    Thrown if multiple validations have failed.
    MutableStringMappers
    Returns the String representation of objects.
    StringMapper
    Returns a String representation of an object.
    StringMappers
    Returns the String representation of objects.
    UpdatableGlobalConfiguration
    Updates the global configuration shared by all validators.
    ValidationFailure
    A failed validation.
    Validators<S>
    A factory that creates different types of validators.
